title: Word Ladder
problem_statement: Return the length of the shortest transformation sequence from beginWord to endWord by changing one letter at a time.
intuition: Use BFS/DFS for traversal, union-find for connectivity.

approaches.name: Optimal Solution
approaches.description: A clean explanation of the optimal approach will be added here.

interview_qa.q: When should you use BFS vs DFS?
interview_qa.a: Use BFS for shortest paths and layered traversal, DFS for reachability and backtracking.

interview_qa.q: How do you avoid revisiting nodes?
interview_qa.a: Mark visited nodes or use a visited set during traversal.
